lessons.title: The Three Data Streams: stdin, stdout, stderr
lessons.description: Understand file descriptors 0, 1, and 2—the hidden plumbing behind every command.

lessons.title: Capturing Output: > and >>
lessons.description: Redirect standard output to files. Learn the crucial difference between overwriting and appending.

lessons.title: Handling Errors: 2> and &>
lessons.description: Separate error messages from normal output. Combine or split streams like a pro.

lessons.title: Feeding Data In: < and Here Documents
lessons.description: Supply input to commands from files or directly within your script using heredocs.

lessons.title: The Black Hole and Advanced Tricks
lessons.description: Master /dev/null, split streams with tee, and unlock process substitution for complex workflows.
